name: coassemble
description: Reads Coassemble courses, screen types, collections, clients, users, learner tracking, and translations, and writes course/collection/client/user/translation lifecycle actions, through the Coassemble headless REST API.

risk.read: external Coassemble headless API read of course, screen type, collection, client, user, tracking, and translation data
risk.write: external mutation of Coassemble courses, collections, clients, users, and translations (publish/duplicate/restore/delete a course; delete a tracking record; create/delete/restore a collection; update/delete a client; update/delete a user; translate/set-default/sync/delete a course translation)
risk.approval: publish/duplicate/restore/create/update actions: none; delete_course/delete_collection/delete_client/delete_user/delete_tracking/delete_translation: approval required (irreversible or high-blast-radius)
